summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, so no canonical was selected. Most hydrated open PRs are retained as independent backlog items; #92021 is routed to central security handling because its own PR body describes an SSRF / credential-exfiltration vector. Five listed candidates were absent from the hydrated preflight artifact, so those decisions need fresh hydration before classification.
